qualification.education_qualification: M. Pharm / M. Tech / MS / MSc with first division and 3-5 years of experience.
qualification.details: Research Manager: M. Pharm (Pharmaceutics/ Pharma analysis/ Pharma Chemistry) / M. Tech (Biotech/ Pharmaceutical Sciences) / MS (Biotech/Pharmaceutical Sciences) / MSc (Biotechnology/ Life Science/ Chemistry/Pharmaceutical chemistry) from a recognized institute/University with first division. 03-05 years of experience in handling & operating sophisticated instrumentation facility and high-end research and analytical instruments.

salary_details.details: Fixed salary of Rs. 70000/- per month

all_official_links.label: Download NIPER Raebareli Research Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Manager position at NIPER Raebareli?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications via email for the Research Manager position is July 10, 2026, up to 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q2. When is the walk-in interview scheduled for the Research Manager role?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Manager position is scheduled to be held on July 15, 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an M. Pharm, M. Tech, MS, or MSc degree with first division from a recognized institute/university.

faq.question: Q4. How many years of experience are required for the Research Manager position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 to 5 years of experience in handling sophisticated instrumentation and high-end research instruments is required.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Research Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Manager position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Manager role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 70,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Research Manager post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Research Manager position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Where is NIPER Raebareli located?
faq.answer: NIPER Raebareli is located in Raebareli, Uttar Pradesh. The walk-in interview will be conducted at the NIPER Raebareli office.
